channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Domestic Violence is a Gendered Issue with Deadly Consequences
item.description: The article highlights the gendered nature of domestic violence, emphasizing that it is often deadly and disproportionately affects women. It critiques political figures like Pauline Hanson for downpl...

item.title: Prince George's 13th Birthday: Family Life and Royal Responsibilities
item.description: Prince George, the eldest son of Prince William and Kate Middleton, is turning 13 and preparing for life at Eton College. The article highlights his relaxed portrait taken after Trooping The Colour, s...

item.title: Asylum claims rise after FIFA World Cup visitors enter Canada
item.description: Over 175 asylum claims have been submitted by visitors who attended the FIFA World Cup in Canada, according to Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC). The majority of applicants came from...

item.title: Styling Tips for Your Favorite Ruffle Blouse
item.description: The article discusses various ways to style a ruffle blouse, emphasizing versatility and confidence. It highlights pairing the blouse with different outfits like high-waisted jeans, skirts, or trouser...

item.title: Nigerian Striker Akor Adams Joins Newly Promoted Italian Club Venezia
item.description: Akor Adams, the Nigerian striker, has completed his transfer to Venezia, an Italian club recently promoted to Serie A. The move marks a significant step in Adams' career, following his previous stints...

item.title: South Africa increases small claims court limit to R30,000
item.description: The Department of Justice and Constitutional Development has raised the monetary limit for small claims courts from R20,000 to R30,000, effective August 1. This adjustment, the first since 2019, aims ...

item.title: Ashtine Olviga Shares Insights on Handling Criticism, Insecurities, and Faith
item.description: Ashtine Olviga recently shared her personal experiences and reflections on navigating online criticism, overcoming self-doubt, and the role of faith in her life. The celebrity opened up about how publ...

item.title: Judge and Guard Killed in Attack Near Mastung
item.description: District and Sessions Judge Abdul Hakeem Kakar and his guard were tragically killed in a targeted attack while traveling from Quetta to Mastung, according to officials. The incident occurred at Wali K...

item.title: AI-Generated Video Allegedly Shows Clash Between Leila de Lima and VP Sara During Impeachment Trial
item.description: The article verifies that a video claiming a confrontation between Senator Leila de Lima and Vice President Sara Duterte during the impeachment trial is entirely AI-generated. No official Senate recor...

item.title: ACT Government Corruption: Union Favoritism Leads to Higher Taxpayer Costs
item.description: The Integrity Commission report has exposed systemic corruption within the ACT government, revealing how union influence skewed public contracts to benefit favoured companies. Two officials, Katy Hair...

item.title: Renowned Montreal pianist Oliver Jones passes away at 91
item.description: The article reports the death of Oliver Jones, a celebrated Montreal-based pianist who died at the age of 91. It highlights his contributions to classical music and his legacy in the local arts commun...

item.title: Addressing Migration Challenges Through Responsible Governance in Africa
item.description: The article explores the multifaceted nature of migration as a global issue, emphasizing the need for responsible governance across Africa. It highlights recent incidents such as anti-migrant protests...

item.title: Wildfire in British Columbia Sparks Evacuations and Evacuation Alerts

item.title: Tanzania diversifies financing by listing shilling bond on London Stock Exchange
item.description: Tanzania is set to list its first shilling-denominated offshore bond on the London Stock Exchange (LSE), a move aimed at diversifying financing for development projects and accessing international cap...

item.title: Protests Against Education System Irregularities and Police Clashes in Delhi
item.description: The article details ongoing protests in Delhi against alleged irregularities in the education system, including competitive exam paper leaks. Students and activists are demanding accountability for th...

item.title: Haydee Garcia's RTW Collection and Puma's Tacklette Shoes Highlight Latest Fashion Trends
